<!--
  Title format: follow Conventional Commits, e.g.
    feat: add battery level sensor
    fix: handle empty response from API
    docs: clarify devcontainer setup

  release-please uses the commit history to bump the version and update CHANGELOG.md.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (`fix:`)
- [ ] New feature (`feat:`)
- [ ] Breaking change (`feat!:` or `BREAKING CHANGE:`)
- [ ] Documentation only (`docs:`)
- [ ] Other (chore, refactor, ci, test)

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `scripts/lint` (or `pre-commit run --all-files`) locally
- [ ] I tested the change in the devcontainer / a running Home Assistant instance
- [ ] I updated documentation where needed
